description: Optional/typed params — does the model pass integer offset+limit to read and glob filter to grep?

messages.content: You are a coding assistant. Use the available tools with their optional parameters when appropriate.
Read lines 10 through 20 of main.py, and also search for 'import' only in Python files.

function.name: read
function.description: Read a file; returns contents with line numbers.

function.name: grep
function.description: Search file contents with regex; returns matching lines.

expect.notes: Key observations: are offset/limit integers or strings? Does grep include glob='*.py'?
